nodes.name: IMAP — Email Trigger (New Inbox)
nodes.notes: Polls Gmail/IMAP inbox every minute for new emails. Configure IMAP credentials in n8n Credentials. For Gmail: enable IMAP in Gmail settings and use App Password.

nodes.name: Code — Parse Email Content
nodes.notes: Extracts sender info, subject, and body. Applies basic keyword pre-scoring before sending to AI for classification.

values.content:
You are a lead qualification specialist for a property automation agency. Classify incoming emails and respond with JSON only.

Classification criteria:
- HIGH: Owner/manager of villa or property, asking about automation services, shows business intent
- MEDIUM: Interested but vague, or could be a good prospect with more info
- LOW: Not relevant, spam, unsubscribe, or completely off-topic

Respond with this exact JSON format:
{
  "quality": "HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW",
  "businessType": "villa owner|property manager|agency|other|unknown",
  "intent": "one sentence describing what they want",
  "numProperties": estimated number or null,
  "qualificationQuestions": ["question 1", "question 2"] // 2 questions to ask
}

nodes.name: OpenAI — Classify Lead Quality
nodes.notes: Uses GPT-4o-mini to classify the email and extract business intent. Configure OpenAI credentials in n8n. Set OPENAI_API_KEY env var.

nodes.name: Code — Parse AI Classification
nodes.notes: Parses the AI JSON response and merges classification fields into the item.

nodes.name: IF — High Quality Lead?
nodes.notes: True: HIGH quality → send personalized reply + add to pipeline. False: MEDIUM/LOW → send nurture or ignore.

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $json.subject }}

nodes.name: Email — Reply to High Quality Lead
nodes.notes: Sends a personalized qualification reply to high-quality leads. Uses AI-generated questions. Env: AGENCY_EMAIL.

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Add to Sales Pipeline
nodes.notes: Saves high-quality leads to the Pipeline sheet for sales team follow-up.

parameters.subject: =Re: {{ $json.subject }}
parameters.text:
=Halo {{ $json.senderName }},

Terima kasih sudah menghubungi PropertyFollow!

Kami adalah agensi yang membantu villa dan properti di Bali & Lombok mengotomasi operasional mereka — dari WhatsApp auto-reply, sinkronisasi kalender, hingga manajemen tamu.

Jika Anda tertarik untuk mengetahui lebih lanjut, silakan kunjungi: [WEBSITE_URL]

Ada pertanyaan? Balas email ini kapan saja.

Salam,
Tim PropertyFollow

nodes.name: Email — Send Nurture Reply (Medium/Low)
nodes.notes: Sends a general brand-awareness reply to medium/low quality leads. Keeps them warm without over-investing time.

main.node: Email — Reply to High Quality Lead
Google Sheets — Add to Sales Pipeline

meta.description: IMAP email trigger → parse content → OpenAI classifies quality → routes to personalized reply + pipeline OR nurture email. Env vars: GOOGLE_SHEET_ID, AGENCY_EMAIL, OPENAI_API_KEY (set in n8n credentials).
